mapper.select: /*PromotionMapper.getGiftPrmtPrdtList*/ SELECT DECODE(C.PRDT_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck , B.PRDT_ID AS prdtId , B.PRDT_NM AS prdtNm , 'N' AS dupYn ,B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS outUnitPric ,C.SORT AS sort FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT B , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT C WHERE B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID(+) AND C.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, prdtNm

/*PromotionMapper.getGiftPrmtDupByInfo*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , C.RATE_CD AS rateCd , D.ON_OFF_TYPE AS onOffType , E.MODEL_ID AS modelId FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT A , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG B , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC C , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF D , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL E WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = E.PRMT_ID AND #{strtDt} <= A.END_DT AND #{endDt} >= A.STRT_DT AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} AND ((A.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y')
OR A.NAC_YN = DECODE(#{nacYn},1,'Y','N')
OR A.MNP_YN = DECODE(#{mnpYn},1,'Y','N')
) AND ((A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_0 = DECODE(#{enggCnt0},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_12 = DECODE(#{enggCnt12},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_18 = DECODE(#{enggCnt18},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_24 = DECODE(#{enggCnt24},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_30 = DECODE(#{enggCnt30},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_36 = DECODE(#{enggCnt36},1,'Y','N')
)
AND B.ORGN_ID IN (SELECT ORG.ORGN_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG ORG WHERE ORG.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND C.RATE_CD IN (SELECT SOC.RATE_CD FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC SOC WHERE SOC.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND D.ON_OFF_TYPE IN (SELECT MCPO.ON_OFF_TYPE FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF MCPO WHERE MCPO.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND E.MODEL_ID IN (SELECT MOD.MODEL_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL MOD WHERE MOD.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND A.PRMT_ID NOT IN (#{prmtId})
ORDER BY B.ORGN_ID, C.RATE_CD, D.ON_OFF_TYPE, E.MODEL_ID

/*PromotionMapper.getGiftPrmtDupByInfo*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , C.RATE_CD AS rateCd , D.ON_OFF_TYPE AS onOffType FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT A , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG B , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC C , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF D WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND #{strtDt} <= A.END_DT AND #{endDt} >= A.STRT_DT AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} AND ((A.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y')
OR A.NAC_YN = DECODE(#{nacYn},1,'Y','N')
OR A.MNP_YN = DECODE(#{mnpYn},1,'Y','N')
) AND ((A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_0 = DECODE(#{enggCnt0},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_12 = DECODE(#{enggCnt12},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_18 = DECODE(#{enggCnt18},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_24 = DECODE(#{enggCnt24},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_30 = DECODE(#{enggCnt30},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_36 = DECODE(#{enggCnt36},1,'Y','N')
)
AND A.PRMT_ID NOT IN (#{prmtId})
ORDER BY B.ORGN_ID, C.RATE_CD, D.ON_OFF_TYPE

/*PromotionMapper.getGiftPrmtOnoffList*/ SELECT DECODE(B.ON_OFF_TYPE, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck , CD_VAL AS onOffType , CD_DSC AS onOffTypeNm FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF B WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'RCP0007' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.CD_VAL = B.ON_OFF_TYPE(+) AND B.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, A.CD_VAL

/*PromotionMapper.getGiftPrmtModelList*/ SELECT DECODE(B.MODEL_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck , A.PRDT_ID AS modelId , A.PRDT_CODE AS modelCode , A.PRDT_NM AS modelNm FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL B WHERE A.PRDT_ID = B.MODEL_ID(+) AND A.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRDT_DT = '99991231'
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01'
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = '02'
AND B.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, A.PRDT_CODE
SELECT COUNT(USR_ID) FROM CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'G_GIFT_PRM' AND USR_ID = #{usrId}
